meaning: Special letters that begin this chapter (their full meaning is known only to Allah)
those who are unaware/ignoring (plural, in subject position)
those who are forcibly made to lift their heads
then he gave him good news
and we write/record (what they sent forth)
what (that which they have sent ahead)
so they strongly denied/rejected both of them
you all (when speaking to a group)
we will definitely stone you all
and surely he will definitely touch you all
rather/but rather (contrasts with what was said before)
O my people! (being called by the man)
the messengers (who were sent with divine messages)
in a state of being lost
by/in your master who cares for you
so listen to me! (to many people)
my caring lord (the one who takes care of me)
and if (connects this condition to previous statements)
and we caused (something) to burst forth abundantly
they show gratitude (referring to those who benefit from Allah's provisions mentioned in the previous ayah)
we strip/peel off (the daylight from the night)
ones who are in deep darkness
like the date stalk (that appears in the sky)
in an orbit (referring to where celestial bodies move)
they glide (through space) (referring to celestial bodies in their orbits)
we drown them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier)
and what (connects to previous warning to fear what is before them)
so that you all (might receive mercy)
their master who cares for them
in complete error (describing the state of those who rejected in this ayah)
they are able (referring to the disbelievers in the ayah)
they (referring to those rising from graves)
who (asking about who woke them up from their sleep)
this (pointing to what the disbelievers are saying about their resurrection)
and he spoke truth (about the resurrection)
you (all) are given what is due
you all do/work (referring to the actions of those being addressed)
of the Paradise (referring to the garden in Heaven)
on that day (when the people of Paradise will be in joy)
in occupations (referring to the people of Paradise being busy with enjoyable activities)
and their spouses (referring to the people mentioned before)
those who are reclining (referring to the people of Paradise)
Did I not make a covenant
Satan (as the object being warned against)
hell (this is the one that was promised to you)
you all reject/deny (referring to the disbelievers being addressed)
we seal (referring to what Allah will do on that Day)
their hands (speaking about the disbelievers whose mouths are sealed)
they earn/gain (referring to what they used to do)
and even if (connecting to previous statement)
they see/perceive (referring to the disbelievers in this ayah)
we turn him completely upside down
not (in this ayah: 'this is nothing but...')
and a clear recitation (referring to the Quran)
a very clear explanation (of the Quran)
so that he may warn (those who are alive)
and we made it (the animals) easy to control
and from them (referring to the animals they eat from)
for/to them (referring to the idols who cannot help their worshippers)
those who are brought (plural passive participle)
who (asks about the person who will give life to the bones)
he gives life to it (referring to bones/earth)
he created it/her (referring to the first creation mentioned in the ayah)
